name: Linzer Thumbprint Snowballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a bowl, mix together the flour, walnuts, cinnamon, and lemon peel.
4. In a large bowl, beat the granulated sugar and margarine on medium speed until creamy.
5. Beat in the egg and vanilla until fluffy.
6. Gradually stir in the flour mixture.
7. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Place the balls 2 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Press your thumb to make a thumbprint indentation in each ball.
10. Fill each indentation with about half a teaspoon of raspberry jam.
11. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown around the edges.
12. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on the cookie sheet.
13. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
